title: JavaScript Concepts
response:
Destructuring lets you extract values from arrays or objects into distinct variables using a matching pattern on the left side of the assignment.

Object destructuring:
• Extract named properties, with optional renaming and default values.

Array destructuring:
• Extract elements by position, with optional skipping and defaults.

Use cases:
• Cleaner function parameter handling.
• Swapping variables.
• Extracting from API responses.
• Importing specific exports.
